mapper.select: SELECT latest.stocks_id, latest.stocks_shortname, latest.feature_time, latest.base_price, latest.ma1d, latest.ma7d, latest.ma30d, latest.zscore1d, latest.zscore7d, latest.zscore30d, latest.rsi, latest.return1d, latest.return7d, latest.return14d, latest.pct_above_30d_low, latest.pct_below_30d_high FROM torn_stocks s JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT f.stocks_id, f.stocks_shortname, f.feature_time, f.base_price, f.ma1d, f.ma7d, f.ma30d, f.zscore1d, f.zscore7d, f.zscore30d, f.rsi, f.return1d, f.return7d, f.return14d, f.pct_above_30d_low, f.pct_below_30d_high FROM torn_stock_strategy_feature f WHERE f.deleted = 0 AND f.stocks_id = s.id AND f.feature_time <= #{analysisTime} ORDER BY f.feature_time DESC LIMIT 1) latest ON true WHERE s.deleted = 0 ORDER BY latest.stocks_id ASC

SELECT stocks_id, stocks_shortname, current_price AS price, investors, reg_date_time FROM torn_stocks_history WHERE deleted = 0 AND reg_date_time > #{startTime} AND reg_date_time <= #{endTime} ORDER BY reg_date_time ASC, stocks_id ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO torn_stock_strategy_feature( stocks_id, stocks_shortname, feature_time, base_price, ma1d, ma7d, ma30d, zscore1d, zscore7d, zscore30d, rsi, return1d, return7d, return14d, pct_above_30d_low, pct_below_30d_high, low30d, high30d, latest_investors, investors_change_7d) VALUES
( #{item.stocksId}, #{item.stocksShortname}, #{item.featureTime}, #{item.basePrice}, #{item.ma1d}, #{item.ma7d}, #{item.ma30d}, #{item.zScore1d}, #{item.zScore7d}, #{item.zScore30d}, #{item.rsi}, #{item.return1d}, #{item.return7d}, #{item.return14d}, #{item.pctAbove30dLow}, #{item.pctBelow30dHigh}, #{item.low30d}, #{item.high30d}, #{item.latestInvestors}, #{item.investorsChange7d} )
ON CONFLICT (stocks_id, feature_time) DO UPDATE SET stocks_shortname = EXCLUDED.stocks_shortname, base_price = EXCLUDED.base_price, ma1d = EXCLUDED.ma1d, ma7d = EXCLUDED.ma7d, ma30d = EXCLUDED.ma30d, zscore1d = EXCLUDED.zscore1d, zscore7d = EXCLUDED.zscore7d, zscore30d = EXCLUDED.zscore30d, rsi = EXCLUDED.rsi, return1d = EXCLUDED.return1d, return7d = EXCLUDED.return7d, return14d = EXCLUDED.return14d, pct_above_30d_low = EXCLUDED.pct_above_30d_low, pct_below_30d_high = EXCLUDED.pct_below_30d_high, low30d = EXCLUDED.low30d, high30d = EXCLUDED.high30d, latest_investors = EXCLUDED.latest_investors, investors_change_7d = EXCLUDED.investors_change_7d
